text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon and Manhattan Cafe happened to
be with me, so the three of them spoke.
Apparently, Trainer's interested in seeing what I'm
like off the track. Whatever that means.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: Trainer also spoke with Fine Motion.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
I can tell Fine Motion is sticking her nose where it
doesn't belong and telling Trainer information
about me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
There has been no change to the
seven-centimeter gap. I told Trainer to stay
focused on our outstanding problem and stop
getting distracted. */
